name: Rihanna
bio: Rihanna has a durable catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: Rihanna remains closely associated with Diamonds and Umbrella, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Diamonds and Umbrella still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings even after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and listener rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand help extend catalog value over time.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from large global streaming demand, hit density, broad playlist inclusion, and licensing-friendly pop/R&B catalog value.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master ownership with artist-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Rihanna, songwriters, producers, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled at the artist-page level
ownership.notes: Headline number estimates artist-side catalog income rather than gross label receipts.
